fasta.title: Reference FASTA
fasta.description: Reference genome FASTA used to build the HISAT2 index.

gtf.title: GTF Annotation (optional)
gtf.description: Gene annotation GTF for building a splice-aware HISAT2 index (optional).

splicesites.title: Splice Sites File (optional)
splicesites.description: Pre-computed splice sites file for HISAT2 index (optional).

hisat2_build_memory.title: HISAT2 Build Memory
hisat2_build_memory.description: Minimum memory (GB) required to use GTF/splice sites during HISAT2 index building.

hisat2_version.title: HISAT2 Version
hisat2_version.description: Select the specific version of HISAT2 to use (see quay.io/biocontainers/hisat2 for available versions)
